title: libertia × butleri
intro: Libertia × butleri, also known as the New Zealand iris or copper iris, is a hybrid plant species within the Iridaceae family. It is a flowering plant native to New Zealand and is known for its copper-colored flowers and sword-shaped leaves. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Libertia × butleri include reducing inflammation and fighting off infections, and it can be prepared as an herbal tincture, tea, or salve for these purposes.
